description: Style notePerfect for a 15 inch laptop (or smaller ones) this padded laptop bag from adidas takes away the geek factor and adds a generous dose of sporty glam to carrying a PC. Product DetailsA black laptop holder with printed branding on frontPadded inner with fabric lining that has branding all overA zipper around three sides of the bagMaterial and Care100% PolyesterDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean clothSizeLength: 28 cmWidth: 38 cm
